meta.title: Integrated OKTAFORCE solutions
meta.description: Discover how OKTAFORCE combines remote concierge, analytical monitoring, intelligent maintenance and facilities to deliver complete condominium security.
meta.keywords: oktaforce, integrated solutions, remote concierge, artificial intelligence, intelligent maintenance

hero.title: Integrated solutions for intelligent condominium security
hero.subtitle: Remote concierge, analytical AI, predictive maintenance and facilities working together to transform your property's operations.

cta.title: Ready to build the ideal ecosystem?
cta.subtitle: Combine our modules to balance security, technology and investment.

sections.title: OKTAFORCE Remote Concierge
sections.headline: Autonomy, intelligence and human service in the same flow.
sections.description: The Essential, Impact, Supreme, Elite, Absolute and Presence plans balance technology, redundancy and on-site support for every condominium profile.
bullets: Access control with facial recognition, biometrics and mobile credentials in the Super App.
24/7 command center with human validation and proprietary artificial intelligence.
Hybrid operation with on-site contingency whenever the project requires it.
Modular playbooks delivering security, autonomy and financial predictability.

sections.title: Analytical Monitoring - OKTAVISION
sections.headline: Active surveillance that anticipates and reacts in real time.
sections.description: OKTAVISION is the property's digital eye, equipped with analytical cameras, active infrared sensors and full connectivity redundancy.
bullets: Continuous behavioral analysis with automated alerts and intelligent reports.
Integration with alarms, electric fences and remote concierge for coordinated response.
Heatmaps, strategic dashboards and auditable history inside the Super App.
Dual access validation and complete perimeter monitoring in real time.

sections.title: Intelligent logistics - Smart Locker & Smart Drop
sections.headline: Secure, trackable and frictionless deliveries.
sections.description: Technology that simplifies daily routines with intelligent lockers connected to the OKTAFORCE ecosystem.
bullets: Digital parcel management through the Super App for residents and managers.
Automatic notifications, QR codes and full pickup tracking.
Integration with postal services and carriers for seamless logistics.
Modular installation adaptable to residential or corporate condominiums.

items.title: OKTAPREV - Intelligent building maintenance
items.description: 24/7 technical support for gates, CCTV, alarms and access control with predictive maintenance to anticipate failures and reduce costs.

items.title: OKTAMONI - Alarm and monitoring 24/7
items.description: Integrated protection between human operators and AI, ensuring real-time security without pauses or blind spots.

items.title: OKTAFORCE Facilities
items.description: On-site concierge, cleaning, janitorial services, reception and operational support connected to our command center for integrated, trackable management.

comparison.title: Quick comparison
comparison.subtitle: What makes OKTAFORCE a benchmark in remote concierge and digital facilities.

features.name: SLA of up to 1h30 for critical risks
